title.zh: 《Business Model Generation / 商业模式新生代》

summary.en: The foundational Strategyzer handbook behind Business Model Canvas: nine building blocks, recurring model patterns, visual design techniques, strategy questions, and a process for moving from idea to model.
summary.zh: Business Model Canvas 背后的基础手册：用九大模块描述商业模式，并系统介绍模式类型、视觉设计方法、战略提问和从想法到模型的设计流程。

recommendation.en: Read this first when a team is still treating BMC as a blank form. It explains what each block means, how the blocks work as a system, and how patterns such as Long Tail, Multi-Sided Platforms, Free, Open, and Unbundling change the model logic.
recommendation.zh: 当团队还只是把 BMC 当作空白表格填写时，优先读这本。它讲清九大模块如何构成系统，并解释长尾、多边平台、免费、开放、拆分等模式如何改变商业逻辑。

headline.en: The source book for reading and designing business models
headline.zh: 读懂和设计商业模式的基础来源

whyOpen.en: Open this before treating a canvas as a worksheet. It explains what each block means, how blocks fit, and why recurring patterns change the whole model.
whyOpen.zh: 在把画布当表格填写之前先读它：它解释每个模块的含义、模块如何互相匹配，以及模式为什么会改变整个模型。

audience.en: Beginners, founders, product teams, and strategy readers who need a shared language.
audience.zh: 适合新手、创业者、产品团队和需要共同语言的战略学习者。

firstSteps.en: Read chapter 1 with the Business Model Canvas open.
firstSteps.zh: 打开商业模式画布同步阅读第 1 章。

firstSteps.en: Use chapter 2 to recognize patterns inside cases instead of memorizing company facts.
firstSteps.zh: 用第 2 章识别案例里的模式，而不是背公司事实。

outcomes.en: You can explain a company with BMC and name the assumptions that still need evidence.
outcomes.zh: 你能用 BMC 解释一家公司，并指出仍需证据的关键假设。

practicePrompts.en: Which block in your own model has the weakest evidence today?
practicePrompts.zh: 你自己的模型里，今天证据最弱的是哪个模块？

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder & Yves Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010
Strategyzer · Business Model Generation book page
